description: Agent Governance — gateway exposes session and circuit-breaker statistics endpoints for operational visibility.

tasks.name: Session stats endpoint
tasks.notes: Admin session stats — gateway should expose session count, active sessions, etc.

tasks.name: Circuit breaker stats endpoint
tasks.notes: Circuit breaker stats — open/closed/half-open counts, trip history.

tasks.name: Governance with auth header
tasks.notes: Authenticated governance call — admin endpoints should accept JWT.

tasks.name: Both endpoints in sequence
tasks.notes: Sequential calls to both endpoints — tests that admin router handles multiple paths.

tasks.name: Governance endpoint response time
tasks.notes: 5 calls — governance endpoints should respond within 2s even under stats computation.
